{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321181035F731C50486B392CF75DD"}"},"total":75},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7461933821102916376","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"讲述了一个名叫陈冲的少年通过自己的不懈努力和坚持，修仙的故事。该书的情节非常出色，每一个细节都为后面的情节发展做了铺垫，让人深深地陷入了其中。此外，作者将爱情、友情等元素巧妙地融入到了故事中，让读者感受到了人性的复杂和丰富性。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737371257,"group_id":"7433971594252274750","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/wWV+S+24oVzqRTzWXSlJg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"783278394582728","user_name":"喜欢安义唢呐的希律王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"783278394582728","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7433971594252274750","book_info":{"abstract":"主角陈翀（chong）一个凡人少年，意外走入仙途，
却发现身具天灵根，因得遇上古神兽幼崽，而避祸深山，
牵连整个村子被屠，而开启复仇之路！
从安宁镇出发，在杀伐中成长，尔虞我诈，但初心不改！
一步一仙途，一途一风景，绝顶何在？
善良、不羁、有情有义的他，
在这弱肉强食的修真世界里，
会发生怎样的故事？他又能走得更高更远吗？……
